stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible and end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped with end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: box_1 (red) is positioned between the robot arms and appears to be held/blocked by the end effectors, so it is not clearly accessible and the end effectors are not clearly grasping nothing.

stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible on top of box_2, and both end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped with both end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: The red box (box_1) is positioned on top of the green box (box_2), but both end effectors are in contact with the red box, so they are not grasping nothing.

stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible and end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped by end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: The red box (box_1) is being held between the robot's arms/end-effectors, so it is not free/accessible and the end-effectors are not grasping nothing.
